test.name: Locality guide for Alabama region, 1800- pre-statehood-repository
test.description: Verify that the skill recognizes Alabama was not yet a state in 1800 and directs researchers to find records in territorial, colonial, and church records instead of modern-day state archives. Ensure jurisdictions-aware guidance by highlighting repositories, territorial offices, church registers, county courthouses while avoiding anachronistic record types.

input.user_message: I'm researching an ancestor who lived in the Alabama region around 1800, before statehood. What archives or record repositories will hold for that locality and period?

judge_context: Must mention territorial, church, land, and court records; must avoid anachronistic record types like state archives or modern databases.
